tribe_description: This micro-cluster is composed mainly of grandparents and other family-oriented shoppers who purchase items as gifts and then rate them based on the recipient’s reaction. Their writing style is brief, upbeat, and practical—often just a sentence or two that confirms the item ‘works great,’ ‘fits well,’ or ‘arrived on time,’ mirroring their core goal of quickly reassuring fellow gift buyers.
tribe_definition: A tribe of gift-focused grand givers who choose products with gifting and recipient delight in mind. They generally prioritize gift-giving, grandparent gifting.
population_definition: Health-conscious consumers who evaluate supplements, personal care, and wellness products.

inherent_behavioral_traits.text: Relies heavily on recipient feedback to form opinions
Uses concise, no-frills language in reviews
Focuses on practicality over technical or price details
Values reliability in shipping and product performance
Often older relatives (e.g., grandparents) buying for children

main.text: Ensuring gifts delight children or other loved ones
Securing on-time, hassle-free delivery before special occasions
Selecting well-made products that last beyond initial excitement
Guaranteeing proper fit or compatibility right out of the box
Providing quick, clear guidance to fellow caregivers
Choosing items that are safe and age-appropriate

validation_triggers: Recipient (grandchild, child, hobbyist) loves the item
Soft, quality materials or sturdy construction
Item ‘works great’ with no setup issues
friction_points: Parts break or fail shortly after purchase
Item is too loose, tight, or otherwise ill-fitting
Game or toy is boring or lacks engagement
Mechanisms (locks, mics, lights) do not function as expected

implicit_goals.text: Avoid gifting disappointments by confirming fit, quality, and durability
Save other gift-givers time through succinct, experience-based reviews

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is primarily a gift-oriented shopper who rates products based on how pleased the recipient (often a grandchild) seems, rather than on personal use. Their reviews are brief, broadly positive confirmations that the item appears to be a good buy and an appropriate present, suggesting a motivation to reassure other gift buyers about value and suitability.

category_characteristics.Software: This user appears motivated primarily by perceived value-for-money, feeling comfortable recommending a purchase even without firsthand experience of the software’s functionality. Their reviews are extremely brief and affirmative, suggesting a low-effort, impulse style aimed more at signaling a good deal or supporting the seller than providing detailed guidance to other shoppers.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user tends to purchase fashion items as gifts and judges them mainly by how pleased the recipient seems, rather than through firsthand experience. Their reviews are brief, informal, and centered on appearance and recipient satisfaction, reflecting a relationship-oriented motivation rather than a desire for detailed product analysis.
category_characteristics.Health & Personal Care: This user offers only minimal context, indicating their primary motivation is simply to log the purchase circumstance rather than assess product performance. Their reviews serve as brief transactional notes—such as stating an item was a gift—suggesting they prioritize record-keeping or disclosure over detailed guidance for others.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is family-oriented and gauges products by the happiness they bring to loved ones, especially grandchildren. Their brief, straightforward reviews focus on whether an item’s quality ultimately matches or exceeds initial expectations, aiming to reassure other practical gift-givers.

category_characteristics.Software: This user writes very concise, expectation-driven reviews, primarily motivated by whether the software aligns with what was promised. They value accurate product representation and use their reviews to signal disappointment and caution others when there is a mismatch.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is a family-oriented gift buyer whose reviews are motivated by ensuring loved ones are pleased with the item. They focus on basic quality confirmation and recipient satisfaction, offering brief, positive remarks rather than detailed analysis.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented gift giver who writes reviews to affirm when items arrive quickly, in good condition, and are suitable for their grandchildren. Their short, enthusiastic endorsements reveal a focus on reliability, convenience, and positive emotional impact rather than technical detail. They are motivated by reassuring other caregivers that a purchase will be hassle-free and well-received.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is family-focused and motivated by finding products that bring joy to their grandchildren, particularly as small, giftable items like stocking stuffers. Their reviews are succinct and positive, functioning as quick endorsements to reassure other shoppers about a product’s suitability for young recipients rather than offering detailed evaluations.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user values straightforward functionality and prompt delivery, commenting mainly on whether the item works as expected, arrives quickly, and is in good condition. Their writing style is concise and enthusiastic, suggesting they are motivated to share quick reassurance and positive reinforcement rather than provide in-depth analysis. The primary purpose of their reviews is to affirm a satisfactory shopping experience and instill confidence in potential buyers.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented gift shopper who reviews primarily to confirm that items delight their child and are appropriate as kid-friendly presents. Their feedback is brief, upbeat, and focused on the recipient’s enjoyment, suggesting a motivation to reassure other parents rather than provide detailed analysis. Their core values center on simplicity, positivity, and the happiness of their child during occasions like Christmas.

category_characteristics.Software: This user offers extremely concise, affect-based feedback, suggesting they are motivated primarily by an immediate emotional reaction rather than analytical evaluation. Their reviews appear to serve as quick personal endorsements rather than detailed guidance for others, indicating a minimalist communication style focused on expressing simple satisfaction.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is family-centric and gift-oriented, focusing on whether a game is appropriate for children and suitable for holiday gifting. Their reviews are extremely brief, suggesting they prioritize quick, practical endorsements over detailed analysis, intending to help parents or gift-givers make fast purchase decisions.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is family-oriented and writes reviews chiefly to indicate that a purchase met the approval of a loved one, such as their daughter. Their motivation centers on confirming recipient satisfaction rather than dissecting product details, leading to concise, positive endorsements that emphasize overall enjoyment.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is family-oriented, judging products mainly by the happiness and practical benefit they bring to loved ones rather than by detailed specifications. Their reviews are concise, affirmative endorsements that highlight basic functionality and recipient approval, aiming to reassure other gift-minded shoppers.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user reviews games chiefly as a gift-giver, gauging quality by whether the recipient—often a family member—enjoyed the item. Their feedback is extremely concise and confirmation-oriented, indicating a motivation to signal successful gift choices rather than provide detailed product analysis.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is results-oriented and focuses on whether a product fulfills its functional purpose, offering succinct feedback when it meets expectations. Their primary motivation appears to be efficiently signaling usefulness to fellow shoppers rather than providing elaborate detail. The brevity of their comment suggests a pragmatic, no-nonsense reviewer who values time and straightforward communication.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is gift- and family-oriented, judging items by how well they meet the needs or interests of specific recipients such as children or hobby enthusiasts. Their feedback is concise and upbeat, aiming to reassure fellow shoppers that the product will delight its intended user rather than offering detailed technical analysis.

category_characteristics.Software: The user's reviews suggest a practical, caregiver-oriented perspective, primarily motivated by assessing software for children’s use and device compatibility. They write very brief, functional notes that simply record the purpose of testing rather than offering detailed evaluations, indicating a focus on confirming suitability and moving on rather than engaging in extensive analysis.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is primarily motivated by a product’s suitability as a gift and the recipient’s resulting satisfaction. Their reviews are brief, upbeat endorsements that emphasize the emotional payoff of successful gifting, aiming to guide fellow shoppers looking for pleasing presents rather than providing detailed product analysis.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user appears to be a family-oriented grandparent whose purchasing and reviewing behavior is driven by how well items serve as educational, enjoyable gifts for their grandchildren. Their reviews are concise, upbeat endorsements that emphasize practical effectiveness (e.g., measuring tremors) and the recipients’ positive reactions, suggesting a motivation to reassure other shoppers about quality and child appeal rather than to provide detailed technical analysis.

category_characteristics.Software: This user values practical effectiveness and educational merit, praising software that accurately quantifies a condition and provides learning opportunities. Their reviews are concise endorsements that focus on usefulness and whether the experience justifies the time invested, suggesting a motivation to guide others toward tools that deliver clear, measurable benefits.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is family-oriented and primarily motivated by how well a product delights their loved ones, especially grandchildren. Their reviews are succinct, emotionally positive endorsements centered on the recipient’s enjoyment rather than technical details, indicating a purpose of affirming good gift choices and sharing that success with others.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented, practicality-driven shopper whose purchasing and reviewing behavior centers on gifts for loved ones (especially a grandchild) and on personally comfortable, well-fitting items. They write brief, affirmative reviews that highlight punctual delivery, proper fit, comfort, and the recipient’s satisfaction, suggesting their main motive is to reassure other buyers about straightforward reliability and everyday usability rather than delve into technical detail.

category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is a practical, family-oriented gift giver who gauges product success by the recipient’s satisfaction and the speed of delivery. Their reviews are concise and reassuring, focusing on basic functionality and prompt arrival rather than detailed technical evaluation. They primarily aim to confirm that a purchase will meet expectations quickly and reliably for others considering similar gifts.
category_characteristics.Software: This user is motivated by ensuring products make successful gifts and meet the recipient’s expectations, with particular attention to timely delivery and basic functionality. Their reviews are brief, second-hand validations that the item was well-received and worked as intended, prioritizing family satisfaction and reliability over detailed personal analysis.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a family-oriented gift-giver whose primary motivation is ensuring a child’s enjoyment; they judge products by the happiness they bring to loved ones rather than technical features. Their reviews are concise, straightforward endorsements intended to confirm the product’s suitability and share reassurance with other caregivers seeking age-appropriate, fun gifts.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is practicality-driven, focusing on everyday comfort, proper fit, and reliable delivery. Their concise, upbeat comments aim to reassure fellow shoppers that items feel good, function well, and arrive on schedule, signaling a trust-building motivation rather than detailed critique. Loyalty and repeat purchasing suggest they value consistency and use reviews primarily to confirm dependable, hassle-free choices.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This reviewer is a family-oriented gift buyer whose evaluations revolve around how much their grandchildren enjoy the items. Their brief, upbeat comments emphasize softness, quality, and recipient delight, suggesting they write mainly to reassure other gift-givers that the product will please children.

category_characteristics.Software: This user writes concise, recipient-focused reviews motivated by their role as a caregiver or gift-giver, gauging software quality by how much it engages and fits the interests of their grandchild rather than by technical merits. Their primary goal is to reassure other family-oriented shoppers that the product is appropriate and enjoyable for children with specific hobbies, so their endorsements are brief and centered on the recipient’s satisfaction.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is motivated by the joy and comfort the product provides to loved ones, evaluating fashion items based on how well they serve as thoughtful gifts. Their reviews are concise, emotionally driven endorsements that highlight sensory qualities such as softness and emphasize the recipient’s satisfaction. They write mainly to confirm successful gifting choices rather than to deliver detailed product breakdowns.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented gift giver—likely a grandparent—whose reviews are driven by the desire to confirm that products delight and are appropriate for their grandson. They write concise, upbeat endorsements that emphasize child enjoyment, ease of play, and product reliability, intending to reassure other caretakers or gift buyers choosing items for young children.

This user is a pragmatic gift-giver and everyday shopper whose reviews center on how well items satisfy recipients, fit properly, and look appealing. They write brief, straightforward endorsements that emphasize comfort, aesthetics, and the positive reactions of loved ones, aiming to reassure fellow buyers about quality and gift suitability rather than provide technical depth.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This user is primarily a gift-giver who evaluates video game products through the lens of how much their young grandchild enjoys them, not through personal use. Their reviews are concise and driven by a desire to confirm a gift’s success and reassure other shoppers, emphasizing recipient satisfaction over technical detail or gameplay critique.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is primarily motivated by fit, comfort, and visual appeal; they compare similar items and highlight nuances in sizing and style that affect overall satisfaction. Their concise reviews aim to guide others with practical, firsthand insights about how products look and feel, emphasizing quality and aesthetic superiority over superficially similar alternatives.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented purchaser who buys mainly for children and grandchildren, so their reviews focus on safe condition, attractive appearance, and timely delivery to guarantee the recipients’ happiness. They write brief, upbeat, sometimes repetitive endorsements that emphasize packaging, seller reliability, and gift suitability, aiming to reassure other caretakers rather than offer in-depth technical critiques.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer writes from the perspective of a caretaker purchasing gifts, so their evaluations center on their children’s or grandchildren’s enjoyment, the item’s physical condition, and prompt, secure delivery. They prioritize reliability and trustworthiness of the seller over personal gameplay details, offering concise, affirming feedback to reassure other gift-oriented buyers. Their purpose is pragmatic and service-focused: to confirm that the product arrives as advertised and elicits happiness in its young recipients.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is guided primarily by aesthetic appeal and how clothing pieces complement the wearer, often envisioning complete outfits and noting decorative details that elevate style or make an item gift-worthy. At the same time, they weigh practical upkeep (e.g., ironing needs) and share concise, friendly observations so other shoppers—especially parents or gift givers—can balance visual charm with ease of care.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user appears to be a gift-focused caregiver, likely a grandparent, who evaluates products primarily through the lens of their grandchildren’s enjoyment and the item’s durability. Their reviews are brief, repetitive, and centered on whether the product delights kids and withstands wear, occasionally noting functional issues (e.g., mic failure) and warranty limits to caution other caretakers. Overall, they write to reassure or warn fellow gift buyers about how well a product will satisfy and last for children.

category_characteristics.Software: This user is family-centric and evaluates software almost entirely by the delight it provides to their grandchildren. Their reviews are short, repetitive, and strongly positive, functioning as quick endorsements rather than detailed assessments. The primary motivation is to share their family’s enthusiasm and reassure other caregivers about kid-approved products.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user reviews primarily to safeguard the satisfaction of family members—especially children—highlighting how product performance and durability affect their loved ones’ experiences. They are reliability- and feature-conscious, noting promised functions (like lighting and mic quality) and pointing out warranty shortcomings to warn others against potential disappointment. Their evaluations are driven by a protective, value-minded stance rather than technical expertise, aiming to help shoppers avoid unreliable purchases.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a family-oriented gift-giver who judges video-game products primarily by the happiness they bring to children and their perceived durability. Their brief, enthusiastic endorsements focus on sturdiness and recipient enjoyment, aiming to reassure other caregivers that the purchase will be both loved and long-lasting.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is gift-oriented and family-focused, evaluating products mainly by how well they delight recipients (e.g., grandkids) and whether they function reliably. Their reviews are concise strings of verdicts—‘fits great,’ ‘works great,’ ‘very disappointed’—suggesting a straightforward, no-nonsense communication style aimed at quickly signaling satisfaction or flaws to help others decide on suitable gifts. Practicality, recipient happiness, and basic product reliability are the primary drivers of their feedback.

category_characteristics.Software: This user provides extremely concise, one-word feedback, suggesting a casual, spontaneous reviewing style driven by immediate emotional reaction rather than detailed analysis. Their primary motivation seems to be sharing a quick positive signal of personal enjoyment, indicating a low-effort, experience-focused approach rather than a desire to inform with specifics or technical insight.
category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is family-oriented and gift-focused, primarily motivated by whether the product delights their grandchildren rather than by personal technical evaluation. Their comments are extremely terse, offering straightforward affirmations about fit and recipient enjoyment, signaling a desire to quickly reassure other shoppers about basic satisfaction and gift suitability.
category_characteristics.Appliances: This user is concise and outcome-focused, offering only a brief confirmation that the appliance performs as expected. Their reviews suggest a utilitarian mindset where verifying basic functionality is enough, favoring minimal effort and quick positivity over detailed analysis or emotional commentary.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This user is strongly quality-driven and feels compelled to speak up when an item’s basic functionality fails, especially when it impacts gifting or personal use. Their reviews are short, emotive warnings intended to prevent others from experiencing similar disappointment and to hold brands accountable for product defects.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a family-oriented gift-giver, likely an older relative, who reviews items based on how well they suit and please young children in their life. Their short, practical comments emphasize tangible results—child engagement, accurate sizing, and sound construction—so other caretakers can reliably judge quality and fit. They are motivated by ensuring gifts are both enjoyable and well-made, using concise observations to guide similar buyers.

category_characteristics.Software: This reviewer is primarily motivated by how well software sustains engagement for its intended audience, judging products against the expectations set by their themes. They pay close attention to discrepancies between anticipated appeal and actual user interest, and write succinct, observational notes to warn or inform others about a title’s ability to captivate specific users.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer is family-oriented and motivated by confirming that garments for loved ones meet practical standards of fit and craftsmanship. They pay close attention to construction details—seams, lining, hemming—and sizing accuracy, writing concise notes to reassure other caretakers about quality and age-appropriateness. Their purpose is utilitarian: to provide clear, trustworthy guidance rather than emotional commentary.

member_user_characteristics.characteristic_summary: This user is a pragmatic, gift-focused shopper who buys mainly for their daughter and judges products by the recipient’s enjoyment, fit, and arrival reliability. They write brief, straightforward reviews that highlight delivery timeliness, basic quality, and whether an item makes a successful present, aiming to help other parents or gift-givers quickly assess suitability. Their motivation is to share concise confirmations or cautions rooted in real gift-giving experiences rather than detailed technical critique or price analysis.

category_characteristics.Video Games: This reviewer is a family-oriented gift buyer whose feedback centers on whether the recipient—often their daughter—enjoys the product and if the purchase process (e.g., on-time delivery, correct sizing) meets expectations. Their brief, positive notes aim to reassure other gift shoppers that the item will please loved ones and arrive reliably, rather than to provide in-depth product analysis.
category_characteristics.Fashion: This reviewer offers concise, balanced feedback that centers on objective quality (well-made, comfortable) while candidly noting how personal fit affects attractiveness. They show empathy and fairness by explicitly considering that their experience may differ from others, indicating a motivation to help fellow shoppers make informed choices. Their style is succinct and pragmatic, prioritizing clear, actionable insights over lengthy detail.

The responsive ULTRA GO cushioning midsole and a smooth leather and mesh fabric upper offer an incredibly responsive workout shoe. The company's success stems from it's high quality, diversified, and affordable product line that meets consumers' Various lifestyle needs. Since it's inception in 1992, the Skechers diverse product offering has grown from utility style boots to include seven Skechers brands and five uniquely branded fashion lines for men and women. Skechers is an award-winning global leader in lifestyle footwear offering shoes that appeal to trend-savvy men, women and kids everywhere. The brand's styles include the latest innovative athletic, casual and fashion sneakers as well as sandals and boots—with many collections featuring Skechers air-cooled memory foam insoles for added comfort. Plus, Skechers offers a range of slip-resistant work FOOTWEAR for men and women, as well as cool, fun, playful and lighted styles that boys and girls love. Always ahead of the fashion curve, Skechers has made its sport, casual and dress casual shoes essential to every closet.

AHQ44OQ3RXGXY4BDZKQZIJDVP3ZA.product_description: TremWatch(TM) Free Edition provides a complete hand tremor measurement, and logging solution. TremWatch(TM) Free Edition has all the features of TremWatch(TM) but has banner ads at the bottom of the page.Banner ads help us support the Multiple System Atrophy Coaltion, and continue development on better releases. If you use TremWatch(TM) please click on a few of the banners each time to help. Each Click Helps!10% of the proceeds from sales of TremWatch(TM) are donated to the Multiple System Atrophy Coalition a 501(c)3 charitable organization. Please visit http://multiplesystematrophy.org to learn more.TremWatch (TM) allows you to:- Measure Tremors in your left and right hands- Distinguish the direction your hand tremor is in (ie. does it tend to move more side to side, forward & backwards, or up and down)- Compare differences & log data over time- Compare multiple separate measurements side by side- Frequencies measured from 0 Hz - 25 Hz (samples taken at 50 Hz)- Graphs auto scale for smaller amplitude measurements-TremWatch(TM) resizes to fit phones, tablets & other devices- Export data for archival or use in other softwareGraphs include:- Tremor Amplitude vs. Frequency for combined tremors- Tremor Amplitude vs. Frequency in separate graphs for each direction X,Y & Z. This allows you to see if your hand movement is mostly sideways, forwards/backwards, or up/down.- Tremor Raw Data (Acceleration vs Time)- Multiple measurements can be seen as graphs side by side for comparison between each hand, measurement dates, etc.* TremWatch(TM) is for educational purposes only and not for medical diagnosis or treatment. Please contact your health professional if you have any concerns regarding tremors.Over 10 million people in the US deal with hand tremors - and a larger number world wide.Tremors can be have many different causes, including Parkinson's disease, Multiple System Atrophy, Multiple Sclerosis, Orthostatic tremor, stroke, brain injury, and other neurodegenerative diseases. Other causes range from the use of some drugs (such as amphetamines, corticosteroids, as well as drugs for certain psychiatric disorders), alcohol abuse or withdrawal, mercury poisoning, over-active thyroid, or liver failure. Some types of tremor are inherited and run in families, others have no known cause such as Essential Tremor.Tremors often begin years, or decades before they're noticed. However people don't have a good way to track what is going on, or what makes their symptoms worse.If someone asks you: “How long have you had that tremor?” or “Has your tremor gotten worse?” It's very hard to say, because it's difficult to notice subtle changes over time.TremWatch(TM) is for personal education and not for medical diagnosis*. It offers an easy way to track what is going on, learn more about their own responses. TremWatch(TM) helps you see how coffee, stress, lack of sleep, or medications seem to affect your tremors.TremWatchTM is the first module in a suite of integrated wellness enhancement tools. A more advanced statistical analysis package is also in development. It will provide ongoing monthly charts of changes in tremor amplitude, frequency and other information. This tool will archive your data and run on multiple platforms.A research version of TremWatchTM will be available for health professionals conducting studies. This version includes other features including real time encrypted data upload. If you are a researcher in this area, please feel free to contact us.
AHQ44OQ3RXGXY4BDZKQZIJDVP3ZA.review_text: This does a good job of measuring the strength of tremors.

AHBPBVP5QXZUYQLQWLG5IVKZJQ2Q.product_description: Why choose Duco Polarized Over Sunglasses? Duco focus on a wide variety of functional glasses from night vision glasses,prescription glasses, sports cycling glasses,anti blue ray radiation computer glasses to UV400 protection polarized sunglasses. We endeavor to provide quality products at prices which provide value to our customers. Features: 1- Wraparound sunglasses: easy to cover your glasses frame 2- HD polarized sunglasses provide UV400 protection 3- Good for sports and other outdoor activities 4-One-piece Nose Pad How to measure your prescription frames for DUCO sunglasses: 1- Measure the widest part of your prescription frames left to right, this is the "width". Next measure the height of the lens with frame included. 2- Choose the DUCO frame that is slightly larger in width and height than your frame measurements. If your frame width is less than 5.7 inches (145 MM),height is less than 1.77inches (45MM), please buy Common size. If your frame width is less than 5.7 inches (145 MM),height is larger than 1.77inches (45MM) and less than 2.52inches (64MM), please buy Plus size. If your frame width is longer than 5.7 inches (145 MM) OR height is larger than 2.52inches(64 MM),please DON'T buy it. Package Includes: 1 * Over Glasses Sunglasses 1 * Hard Case 1 * Polarized Test Card 1 * Microfiber Cleaning Cloth 1 * Microfiber Glasses Pouch 1*Mini screwdriver Warm Tips: 1. Do not use paper towels or clothing to clean the sunglasses, otherwise skin may be scratched. 2. Never put sunglasses under the front window of a car, especially in summer
AHBPBVP5QXZUYQLQWLG5IVKZJQ2Q.review_text: Great pair of sunglasses. Fit is good and they look great on. I bought other over the glasses sunglasses but I did not care for the style even though the style was very similar. There is something about these glasses that just look better. Very happy with this pair.

You can your kitten can decorate your house together. You can train andbeautify your panion to win fame and fortune in the talent shows. Oryou can watch it soak up your attention. Either way you have a wonderfulnew friend who's always ready to play!Includes Abyssinian: These intelligent independent cats love high places. they will jump on anything they can. Abyssinians also have much more energy than other breeds. they can play for hours at a time. their sleek coats don't require much attention. Bengal: These bright cats are easy to train and nearly trouble-free perfect for new pet owners. the Bengal needs more food and water than other breeds. Burmese: These intelligent obedient cats stick close by their owners. Burmese also have a tendency to scratch anything that es their way. Be firm! Main Coon: These big cats are very smart and surprisingly quick. Maine Coons learn new tricks easily but they need more food rest and grooming than other breeds. Siamese: Sleek and agile Siamese are the elite of the feline world. They love attention but they prefer to take care of themselves. they are also extremely vocal. If you like meowing this is the cat for you!Product FeaturesCustomize your pet: To start your new life with a pet first selecta breed from the adoption center. AH72L5LVDSETXAHRODL6WHXZCASA.product_description: Product Description Barbie Groom and Glam Pups lets you adopt and take care of adorable dogs. It's a puppy-pal paradise Amazon.com Barbie Groom and Glam Pups is a virtual pet game for Nintendo DS and DSi in which players groom, train, dress and show puppies in a high fashion game environment under the watchful eye of their in-game mentor, Barbie. The game features six available breeds of dog in puppy form selected for use in the game based on popularity and dramatic styling potential. Additional features include: realistic grooming activities, the ability train your pups to do outrageous tricks that they can perform on the catwalk, customizable puppy costumes and in-game photoshoot functionality for puppies. Groom, Train and Dress Puppies with Barbie Barbie Groom and Glam Pups is an all-new Barbie video game, set in a fashion-oriented environment, that lets players choose a pup from one of six adorable breeds, then groom it, train it, dress it up and show it using the game's built-in economy. Throughout the game, Barbie herself serves as a mentor for players, providing instruction and tips. Players will groom their pet with realistic techniques including bathing and brushing before teaching the pup fun tricks like jump, kiss and spin. Players can also customize the look of their dog with fabulous clothing, collars and costumes. Game Features Six adorable breeds of dogs available in-game selected based on popularity and dramatic styling potential Six adorable breeds of dogs available in-game selected based on popularity and dramatic styling potential Realistic grooming techniques including bathing and brushing that keep your pup looking good and happy Realistic grooming techniques including bathing and brushing that keep your pup looking good and happy Teach your pup fun tricks like jump, kiss and spin Teach your pup fun tricks like jump, kiss and spin Accessorize your pup with glam clothing, collars and costumes Accessorize your pup with glam clothing, collars and costumes Participate in the ultimate dog show, including a runway event, photo shoot and freestyle dance segment Participate in the ultimate dog show, including a runway event, photo shoot and freestyle dance segment Additional Screenshots Real grooming techniques. View larger. Customize your pup's looks. View larger. Use your training tools. View larger. Walk the dog on the catwalk. View larger.
